note_en: Fable 5 Max's own reads on every MSI 2026 Bracket Stage series — for entertainment, not betting advice. Double-elimination, all series Bo5, Fearless Draft (each champion locks out for both teams once picked in the series). Odds shown only where a real book price was found (GG.bet); otherwise Fable states its own probability plainly as a call, not a market price.
note_zh: Fable 5 Max 对每场 MSI 2026 淘汰赛的个人研判——仅供娱乐，不构成博彩建议。双败淘汰赛制，全部系列赛 Bo5，赛制为 Fearless Draft（同一系列赛内任意一方选过的英雄，双方均不可再选）。仅在查到真实盘口（GG.bet）时展示赔率；其余情况 Fable 直接给出自己的概率研判，不冒充市场价格。

record.note_en: Fable series-outcome calls scored from Bracket Stage Round 1 onward, through the Grand Final. Updated daily. ⭐ = exact series score. ✓ = correct outcome.
record.note_zh: 自淘汰赛第一轮起对 Fable 系列赛胜负预测计分，并延续至总决赛，每日更新。⭐ = 比分全中，✓ = 结果正确。

champion.reason_en: Still MSI's only unbeaten team (6-0 in maps). Idle this round while awaiting BLG, who swept LYON 3-0, in the Upper Bracket Final on July 9.
champion.reason_zh: 仍是本届赛事唯一不败战队（map战绩6-0）。本轮轮空，7月9日上位组决赛迎战3-0横扫LYON的BLG。

champion.reason_en: Swept LYON 3-0 in UB R2 (12-11, 31-18, a 39-min Dragon Soul decider) to reach the Upper Bracket Final vs HLE, July 9 08:00 UTC.
champion.reason_zh: 上位组第二轮3-0横扫LYON（12-11、31-18，第三局靠龙魂团31分钟收官），晋级上位组决赛战HLE，7月9日（UTC 08:00）。

champion.reason_en: Bounced back from the BLG loss with a clean 3-0 sweep of FURIA (Peyz's Caitlyn a standout in Game 2). Faces G2 in Lower Bracket R2, July 8.
champion.reason_zh: 输给BLG后迅速反弹，3-0横扫FURIA（第二局Peyz的凯特琳表现亮眼）。下位组第二轮7月8日战G2。

champion.reason_en: Idle this round after upsetting TES. Awaits LYON in Lower Bracket R2, July 8 — a win keeps the Cinderella run alive, a loss ends it.
champion.reason_zh: 爆冷淘汰TES后本轮轮空。下位组第二轮7月8日战LYON——胜则黑马之旅延续，负则出局。

champion.reason_en: Pushed BLG in every game (12-11, 31-18, a 39-min G3) before falling 0-3 in UB R2. Drops to Lower Bracket R2 vs TSW, July 8 — one loss from elimination.
champion.reason_zh: 上位组第二轮0-3不敌BLG，但每局都缠斗到底（12-11、31-18、第三局39分钟）。跌入下位组第二轮战TSW，7月8日——再负即出局。

champion.reason_en: Swept 0-3 by HLE in UB R2, dropping to the lower bracket. Faces T1 in Lower Bracket R2, July 8 — a tough draw against the reigning World Champions.
champion.reason_zh: 上位组第二轮被HLE 0-3横扫，跌入下位组。下位组第二轮7月8日战T1——对阵卫冕世界冠军，局面艰难。

mvp.reason_en: Posted a 20/7/25 KDA (77.6% kill participation) in BLG's 3-0 sweep of LYON — the tournament's most dominant mid laner, now awaiting HLE in the July 9 Upper Bracket Final.
mvp.reason_zh: 对阵LYON系列赛KDA 20/7/25（击杀参与率77.6%），随BLG 3-0横扫晋级——本届最具统治力的中路，静候7月9日上位组决赛战HLE。

mvp.reason_en: HLE idle this round. Still the tournament's premier mid-lane form case after his series-MVP sweep of G2, awaiting the July 9 Upper Bracket Final vs BLG.
mvp.reason_zh: HLE本轮轮空。此前横扫G2的系列赛MVP表现仍是本届最佳中路状态代表，静候7月9日上位组决赛战BLG。

mvp.reason_en: HLE idle this round; still the backbone of the tournament's only unbeaten roster, awaiting the July 9 Upper Bracket Final.
mvp.reason_zh: HLE本轮轮空；仍是全场唯一不败战队的核心，静候7月9日上位组决赛。

mvp.reason_en: Named series MVP in T1's 3-0 sweep of FURIA, anchoring the bot lane alongside Keria through crucial Game 3 outplays that saved a wobbling map (per match recaps).
mvp.reason_zh: T1 3-0横扫FURIA的系列赛MVP，与Keria联手在关键的第三局多次高光操作力挽狂澜（据赛后报道）。T1下位组重整旗鼓中的核心话题人选。

mvp.reason_en: T1 bounced back from the BLG loss with a clean 3-0 sweep of FURIA. Faces G2 next in Lower Bracket R2 — pedigree keeps him live if T1 runs the table.
mvp.reason_zh: T1输给BLG后迅速反弹，3-0横扫FURIA。下位组第二轮将战G2——若T1能连胜到底，其底蕴仍是MVP话题焦点。

mvp.reason_en: Idle this round. Still TSW's Cinderella-story core ahead of a Lower Bracket R2 elimination match vs LYON, July 8.
mvp.reason_zh: 本轮轮空。仍是TSW黑马故事的核心，7月8日下位组第二轮迎战LYON的生死战在即。

fearless.note_en: Full 3-game sweep of TSW: 15 unique champions across the series, none repeated — confirmed via gol.gg official match data.
fearless.note_zh: 3-0横扫TSW全系列共用15个不重复英雄——数据来自gol.gg官方赛事记录，已核实。

fearless.note_en: Lost the series 0-3 to HLE but still drew 15 unique picks across 3 games — confirmed via gol.gg official match data.
fearless.note_zh: 0-3不敌HLE，但全系列仍用了15个不重复英雄——数据来自gol.gg官方赛事记录，已核实。

fearless.note_en: Reverse-swept TES 3-2 from 0-2 down — the full 5 games drew 25 unique champions, none repeated. Confirmed via gol.gg official match data.
fearless.note_zh: 0-2落后逆转3-2淘汰TES——五局系列赛共用25个不重复英雄。数据来自gol.gg官方赛事记录，已核实。

fearless.note_en: Led G2 2-0 before losing 3 straight — the full 5 games drew 25 unique champions, none repeated. Confirmed via gol.gg official match data.
fearless.note_zh: 曾2-0领先G2后连丢三局——五局系列赛共用25个不重复英雄。数据来自gol.gg官方赛事记录，已核实。

fearless.note_en: Won a five-game war with T1 (3-2) — the full series drew 25 unique champions, none repeated. Confirmed via gol.gg official match data.
fearless.note_zh: 五局苦战3-2力克T1——全系列共用25个不重复英雄。数据来自gol.gg官方赛事记录，已核实。

fearless.note_en: Pushed BLG to 5 games before losing 2-3 — the full series drew 25 unique champions, none repeated. Confirmed via gol.gg official match data.
fearless.note_zh: 五局苦战2-3不敌BLG——全系列共用25个不重复英雄。数据来自gol.gg官方赛事记录，已核实。

fearless.note_en: Swept FURIA 3-0 — 15 unique champions across the 3 games, none repeated. Confirmed via gol.gg official match data.
fearless.note_zh: 3-0横扫FURIA——全系列共用15个不重复英雄。数据来自gol.gg官方赛事记录，已核实。

fearless.note_en: Swept 0-3 by LYON — still drew 15 unique picks across the 3 games. Confirmed via gol.gg official match data.
fearless.note_zh: 被LYON 0-3横扫——全系列仍用了15个不重复英雄。数据来自gol.gg官方赛事记录，已核实。

series.reason_en: LCK 1st seed vs LCP 1st seed — a clear class gap on paper; HLE to win comfortably.
series.reason_zh: LCK 头号种子对 LCP 头号种子——纸面实力差距明显，HLE 稳胜。

series.reason_en: LEC 1st seed vs LPL 2nd seed — LPL depth favoured TES on paper; called for TES in 4. G2's reverse sweep from 0-2 down was the upset of the round.
series.reason_zh: LEC 头号种子对 LPL 二号种子——纸面上 LPL 深度更受看好，原判 TES 4 局取胜。结果 G2 从 0-2 逆转 3-2，是本轮最大爆冷。

series.reason_en: CBLOL 1st seed vs LCS 1st seed — the tournament's two long-shot regions meet; LYON's recent international reps give a slight scouting edge over FURIA. LYON swept 3-0, cleaner than called.
series.reason_zh: CBLOL 头号种子对 LCS 头号种子——本届赛事两个胜算最低的赛区正面对决；LYON 近期的国际赛经验略占情报优势。结果 LYON 3-0 横扫，比原判更加干净利落。

series.reason_en: The marquee tie of the round: 2026 First Stand champions vs the three-time reigning World Champion. Fable leaned T1 in a close one; BLG won it 3-2 instead — the tiebreaker cut the other way.
series.reason_zh: 本轮焦点战：2026 First Stand 冠军对阵卫冕三届世界冠军。Fable 原判略微倾向 T1，结果 BLG 3-2 取胜——关键分歧点最终倒向了另一边。

series.reason_en: Winners of UB R1 meet for a spot in the Upper Bracket Final, July 5 08:00 UTC. HLE's clean 3-0 sweep looked more dominant than G2's 5-game escape from 0-2 down; leaning HLE, but G2's reverse-sweep run shows real depth.
series.reason_zh: 上位组第一轮胜者会师，争夺上位组决赛席位，7月5日（UTC 08:00）开战。HLE 干净利落的 3-0 横扫，观感强于 G2 从 0-2 逆转的五局苦战；倾向 HLE，但 G2 的逆转过程也证明了阵容深度。

series.reason_en: UB R1 losers' elimination match, July 5 03:00 UTC. TES led G2 2-0 before losing three straight — underlying form still reads stronger than TSW, who were swept 0-3 outright with a low kill/tower count. Leaning TES.
series.reason_zh: 上位组第一轮败者的生死战，7月5日（UTC 03:00）开战。TES 曾 2-0 领先 G2 后连丢三局——底层实力仍强于被 HLE 直接 0-3 横扫、击杀推塔数据均落后的 TSW。倾向 TES。

series.reason_en: Three-time reigning World Champion vs CBLOL's 1st seed, already swept 0-3 by LYON. A huge gulf on paper; T1 to cruise despite the lower-bracket setback vs BLG.
series.reason_zh: 卫冕三届世界冠军对阵 CBLOL 头号种子（已被 LYON 0-3 横扫）。纸面实力差距悬殊，尽管刚不敌 BLG 跌入下位组，T1 大概率轻取。

series.reason_en: BLG's five-game survival vs T1 showed resolve; LYON's clean 3-0 over FURIA is the region's best MSI result in years but against a clearly lower tier of opponent. Leaning BLG.
series.reason_zh: BLG 五局逆境求生力克 T1，展现韧性；LYON 3-0 横扫 FURIA 虽是赛区近年最佳战绩，但对手实力层级明显更低。倾向 BLG 晋级。

series.reason_en: HLE remain unbeaten (6-0 in maps) and idle since July 5; BLG arrive off back-to-back series (a five-game war with T1, then a 3-0 sweep of LYON). Leaning HLE, but expecting it close.
series.reason_zh: HLE 仍保持不败（map战绩6-0）且自7月5日起轮空休整；BLG 则连战两轮（五局力克T1，再3-0横扫LYON）。倾向 HLE 晋级，但预计过程胶着。

series.reason_en: G2 arrive off a demoralizing 0-3 sweep by HLE, while T1 just swept FURIA 3-0 to steady themselves. Three-time World Champion pedigree and form both favor T1.
series.reason_zh: G2 刚被 HLE 0-3 横扫，士气受挫；T1 则3-0横扫FURIA重新找回状态。无论底蕴还是近况均更看好 T1。

series.reason_en: Elimination match between two survivors: LYON fought BLG close in every game before falling 0-3; TSW enter off a 3-1 upset of TES. A genuine toss-up, leaning LYON.
series.reason_zh: 两支幸存者的生死战：LYON 虽0-3不敌BLG，但每局都缠斗到底；TSW 则带着3-1爆冷TES的士气而来。基本势均力敌，略微倾向LYON。

series.reason_en: Bracket not yet resolved — matchup TBD.
